title: Build Akshar Learning Hub Website from Scratch

requirements.text: Redesign the entire frontend with a bright, energetic neon-accented color palette suited for Grade 1–8 students. Use vibrant colors such as electric cyan, neon yellow-green, hot pink, and vivid orange as accents on a clean white/light background. Use modern sans-serif typography (Poppins/Nunito). All icons must be modern (Lucide or similar). The design should be minimalistic yet energetic — clean layouts with bold neon highlights, not cluttered.

quotes: brighter and energetic with some neon in it. Must suit grade 1st to 8th

acceptanceCriteria: Neon accent colors are visibly present across sections (buttons, highlights, badges, borders)
Overall layout remains clean and minimalistic
Typography uses Poppins and/or Nunito
Icons are modern and consistent throughout

requirements.text: Build a Hero/Home section as the landing area for Akshar Learning Hub. Include the firm name 'Akshar Learning Hub', a compelling tagline, a brief intro about the tutoring services, and two CTA buttons: 'Book Free Demo' and 'Explore Programs'. Apply energetic neon-accented styling with animated elements.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays firm name 'Akshar Learning Hub' prominently
Tagline and brief description are present
'Book Free Demo' and 'Explore Programs' CTA buttons are visible
Section uses neon-accented design with animations

requirements.text: Build an About section highlighting Akshar Learning Hub's positive learning environment. Emphasize: student discipline, attention to detail to avoid silly mistakes, life skills development, social growth, and increased student confidence. Include placeholder testimonial-style highlights from students and parents.
acceptanceCriteria: About section covers discipline, life skills, confidence, social growth
Positive environment messaging is clearly communicated
Section uses modern card or highlight layouts

requirements.text: Build individual service sections for each of the following Akshar Learning Hub offerings, each with its own dedicated section/card layout, description, target grade range, and a modern icon: (1) After School Education Support (Tuitions) for Grade 1–8, (2) Phonics program, (3) Maths coaching, (4) Special Subject Mentoring, (5) Scholarship & Exam Preparation for Grade 5–10. Each service section must be visually distinct with neon-accented styling.
acceptanceCriteria: Five separate service cards/sections are rendered
Each service has a title, description, grade range, and modern icon
Scholarship & Exam Prep clearly targets Grade 5–10
Phonics and Maths are listed as standalone services

requirements.text: Build a Testimonials/Results section with placeholder student and parent success stories. Include at least 4–6 placeholder testimonial cards with names, roles (parent/student), grade level, and a short positive quote. Use a carousel or grid layout.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 4 placeholder testimonial cards are shown
Each card has a name, role (parent or student), and quote
Layout is carousel or responsive grid

requirements.text: Build a Downloads section with three categories: (1) Free Downloads — openly accessible worksheets and materials with a direct download button; (2) Sign-up Required Downloads — gated by email + phone OTP verification before download is unlocked; (3) Paid Downloads — clicking redirects the user to a Payment page showing UPI/QR placeholder. Include placeholder cards for future uploads with clear labels indicating the material type (e.g., Phonics Workbook, Maths Worksheet, Past Exam Paper).
acceptanceCriteria: Three clearly labelled download categories are present: Free, Sign-up Required, Paid
Free download buttons work directly
Sign-up required downloads trigger the OTP modal before unlocking
Paid download buttons navigate to the Payment page
Placeholder cards for future uploads are visible with labels

requirements.text: Implement a simulated OTP verification flow for sign-up gated downloads. When a user clicks a gated download, show a modal asking for their name, email address, and phone number. Validate email format and phone number format (10-digit Indian mobile). On submission, generate a 6-digit OTP, display it on-screen (simulated delivery — show OTP in the UI with a note that it would be sent via SMS in production), store the user's email and phone in the Motoko backend, and require the user to enter the OTP to proceed. On correct OTP entry, unlock the download.
acceptanceCriteria: Modal collects name, email, and phone
Email format and 10-digit phone validation are enforced
A 6-digit OTP is generated and displayed on-screen after form submission
OTP entry field appears after submission
Correct OTP unlocks the download; incorrect OTP shows an error
User's email and phone are stored in the Motoko backend actor
UI clearly states OTP is simulated

requirements.text: Build a Payment page/section for paid worksheet purchases. This page should display a placeholder UPI QR code image (with a note to replace it), a placeholder UPI ID field (e.g., 'yourname@upi'), and instructions to complete payment and contact via WhatsApp to receive the material. Include a WhatsApp link for post-payment confirmation.
acceptanceCriteria: Payment page shows a placeholder QR code image
Placeholder UPI ID is displayed with an edit note
Payment instructions are clearly written
WhatsApp link for post-payment contact is present

requirements.text: Build a Contact section with the following details: Phone number 7718823635 (clickable tel: link), a direct WhatsApp link pre-filled with an inquiry message to 7718823635, and the address: Opposite Pratibha College, Chinchwad, Pune 411019. Do NOT include an email address. The section should use modern card/icon layout with neon accents.
acceptanceCriteria: Phone number 7718823635 is displayed and clickable (tel: link)
WhatsApp button links to wa.me/917718823635 with a pre-filled message
Address 'Opposite Pratibha College, Chinchwad, Pune 411019' is shown
No email address is displayed
Section uses modern icon and card layout

requirements.text: Build a fixed floating WhatsApp button visible on all pages/sections, linking to wa.me/917718823635 with a pre-filled inquiry message for Akshar Learning Hub.
acceptanceCriteria: Floating WhatsApp button is always visible on screen
Clicking opens WhatsApp with the correct number and a pre-filled message
Button does not obstruct main content significantly

requirements.text: Build a responsive fixed navigation header with the Akshar Learning Hub logo/name, nav links to all sections (Home, About, Services, Downloads, Contact), an 'Enroll Now' CTA button with neon accent styling, and a mobile hamburger menu.
acceptanceCriteria: Header is fixed at the top on scroll
Nav links scroll smoothly to each section
'Enroll Now' button is prominently styled with neon accent
Mobile hamburger menu works on small screens

requirements.text: Build a site Footer with Akshar Learning Hub branding, quick navigation links, a list of programs/services, and contact info (phone and address only, no email). Include the WhatsApp link.
acceptanceCriteria: Footer displays firm name and tagline
Quick nav links are present
All services are listed
Phone and address are shown; no email
WhatsApp link is included

requirements.text: Implement the Motoko backend actor to store user sign-up data (name, email, phone number) submitted during the OTP gated download flow. Expose functions: registerUser(name: Text, email: Text, phone: Text) : async Text (returns generated OTP), verifyOTP(email: Text, otp: Text) : async Bool (validates OTP), and getUsers() : async [User] (admin query). Store records in a stable var array or HashMap.
acceptanceCriteria: registerUser stores the user and returns a 6-digit OTP string
verifyOTP returns true for correct OTP, false otherwise
User data (name, email, phone) persists in stable storage
No real SMS is sent — OTP is returned from the function for display

constraints: Do NOT include email address anywhere on the website
OTP delivery must be simulated (displayed on-screen) — no real SMS/email integration
Paid worksheet flow must redirect to a UPI/QR payment placeholder page — no real payment gateway
All backend logic must remain in a single Motoko actor (backend/main.mo)
Do not edit files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Real SMS or email OTP delivery
Real payment processing or Stripe integration
Actual file upload/management system for worksheets

required: Vibrant hero banner for an educational tutoring website with neon accents (cyan, yellow-green, hot pink), books, stars, and pencils on a clean white background (hero-banner.dim_1440x600.png)
Modern minimalistic logo mark for 'Akshar Learning Hub' — a stylized letter A with a book or pencil motif in neon cyan and orange on white (akshar-logo.dim_400x400.png)
Colorful illustration of happy diverse children studying together at desks with books and a chalkboard, bright neon-accented style (about-illustration.dim_800x500.png)
Bright neon-accented icon set illustration showing five services: tuitions, phonics, maths, mentoring, exam prep as individual square tiles on white (services-icons.dim_1200x300.png)
Placeholder QR code graphic styled with neon cyan border and 'Scan to Pay' label (payment-qr-placeholder.dim_300x300.png)
